content.title: Welcome to Styx Omega!
content.text:
Styx was made to be an easy, no bullshit place to play ARK. It was intended for friends but if you wanna play here, Welcome! Just Please read the very small list of info here and box 2! 
<TextStyle.Yellow>Discord</> Nada. If we end up with a bunch of players, ill add one here. Otherwise, head to the help section. 
 
<TextStyle.Yellow>Stats</> x3 Experience, x5 Harvesting & Taming
<TextStyle.Yellow>Breeding</> x85 Mature, x65 Incubation, 1 Imprint 
<TextStyle.Yellow>Decay</> Thatch: 20D > Wood: 40D > Stone: 60D, Metal: 80D, Tek: 100D

<TextStyle.Yellow>Base Rules</> 
<TextStyle.Green>Limits ></> 1 Base Per PERSON (not tribe)! Place an Awesome Teleporter OUTSIDE your base with your player name so I know who it belongs to. No Teleporter gets you a wiped on Wednesdays. Does not need to be public. 
<TextStyle.Green>No Lag! ></> Dont cause lag. If you cause lag, i will leave a billboard with a day it needs rectified. We can communicate on discord farther or use billboards to let me know you fixed it. 
<TextStyle.Green>Dont's > </>Dont build on resources, dont leave traps around, dont leave teleporters, all that. Keep your mess at your base. EZ.

<TextStyle.Yellow>Conduct Rules</> Listen, just dont be an ass. Its PVE. Dont touch what isnt yours, mess with anyones taming, base, griefing, etc. Instant ban for bullshit.

<TextStyle.Red>NEED HELP?</>
Admin support is available for some things by contacting Luna on discord: my name is: luna_vicious 
 These things include (but not limited to):
   >Being Griefed
   >Losing Characters
   >Severe Ark Losses
   >Severe Bug Reporting
   >Requests

What I will not deal with is small losses, a few dino deaths, tribe issues, drama, etc. I dont got the time.

content.title: Perks and Trading
content.text:
<TextStyle.Yellow>Trading</> We have a mod for player shop tables! Use them as you like. Please put "shop" in your teleporter name so we can go shop! 

<TextStyle.Yellow>Some Other Things We Offer</> 
Starters at the Community Center - First Spawn
CryoLess Digitizer Gun & Terminals
Lightly buffed player stats per level up
Custom Ring Drops with Omega Items
   >White Ring Has Basic to Delta Potions/Items/Arrows
   >Green Ring Has Delta to Gamma Potions/Items/Arrows
   >Blue Ring Has Gamma to Beta
   >Purple Ring Has Beta to Alpha Potions/Items/Arrows
   >Yellow Ring Has Alpha to Elite Potions/Items/Arrows/Metal Arrows
   >Red Ring Has Elite+ Potions/Items/Arrows/Metal Arrows/Shards 
NO Useless Dino bones or Rockwell Recipes
Updated Potions to use Omega items
Admin Tables (may not be completed - est completion June 15th)
Riders Are Safe on Tames!
Removed Useless Engrams
Blocked Pegos and Stealy Birds (pm me if you want one)
Blocked Tames that cant be Omegafied
Added PiggyBacks
Chill, No Drama Atmosphere
No Discord Required
No Special Currencies To Deal With
Admin Tables Offer Material Exchanges and Ascension Potions for Essences 
Faster Machines, More Range on Depot Terminals
Auto Dino Wipes Every 8 Hours
8 Hour Miracles
Awesome Ark Tools Dino Finder
Awesome Ark Tools Commands (go to Preferences > Automation)
Manual Server Restarts - I'll Do Them When No Ones Online For As Much Uninterrupted Play As Possible.
